_comment: EditorAI few-shot examples. X normalized to start at 0 per section.

examples.author: IIINePtunEIII
examples.description: A clean retro-style remake of the classic GD level 'Back on Track'. Spike trains, simple jump arcs, gradient blocks, occasional dual portals. Very symmetric and rhythmic; ideal reference for medium-difficulty cube gameplay.

examples.author: IIINePtunEIII

examples.author: Sumsar
examples.description: Modern remake of Stereo Madness with grid-patterned blocks, lots of decoration clouds, and gentle spike/orb progression. Showcases legible cube gameplay with classic GD vibe — heavy on platform stacks at fixed heights.

examples.author: Sumsar
examples.description: Modern remake of Stereo Madness with grid-patterned blocks, lots of decoration clouds, and gentle spike/orb progression. Showcases legible cube gameplay with classic GD vibe — heavy on platform stacks at fixed heights.

examples.author: Ggb0y
examples.description: A famous Insane Demon. Dark palette dominated by black and red. Sawblades EVERYWHERE, tight spike corridors, lots of decoration_cloud at varying scales for ambience. Heavy use of color triggers (~500) to flash the palette during intense segments.

examples.author: Skitten
examples.description: Neon-modern style with lots of block_outline silhouettes, ~300 pulse triggers driving background flashes, and ~270 move triggers animating platforms. Color palette skews bright blue / pink / cyan. Wave segments alternate with ship sections.

examples.author: UsernameDefault
examples.description: Industrial-themed Hard demon. Mostly block_outline silhouettes with green/yellow pulse highlights. Lots of ball-mode segments via portal_ball. Spike fields tight, decoration sparse but coordinated.

examples.author: Adiale
examples.description: A clean, well-paced modern level. Smooth color transitions between sections, tasteful decoration without overload. Good reference for 'modern but not flashy' design — readable gameplay with subtle visual polish.

examples.author: TamaN
examples.description: Ambient/floaty atmosphere with smooth flow gameplay. Subtle alpha fades, slow color drifts, low-intensity hazards. Lots of negative space; objects positioned for visual breathing room rather than dense gameplay.
